hero.description: CLI proxy that reduces LLM token consumption by 60-90% on common dev commands. Single Rust binary, zero dependencies
hero.reason: Rust编写的LLM令牌消耗代理，性能优异且专注开发者工具。

summary.zh: 一个命令行代理，可将常见开发命令中的LLM令牌消耗减少60-90%。单一Rust二进制文件，零依赖。
summary.en: rtk is a CLI proxy that reduces LLM token consumption by 60-90% on common dev commands. Written in Rust, it is distributed as a single binary with zero dependencies. With over 43,000 GitHub stars, it is a popular open-source tool for cutting AI API costs without sacrificing functionality. It works transparently by intercepting API calls and applying compression to minimize token usage while preserving output quality.

items.description: Warp is an agentic development environment, born out of the terminal.
items.reason: Rust构建的智能终端开发环境，契合终端UI和LLM工具主题。

summary.zh: Warp 是一款基于终端的智能开发环境，通过 AI 代理提升命令行体验，替代传统终端。
summary.en: Warp is an agentic development environment built on the terminal, enhancing command-line workflows with AI-driven assistance. It replaces traditional terminals with features like smart autocomplete, natural language commands, and collaborative editing, making development faster and more intuitive.

items.description: A cross-platform desktop All-in-One assistant tool for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, openclaw & Gemini CLI.
items.reason: 跨平台AI助手工具，Rust实现，专注LLM和开发者效率。

summary.zh: 一个跨平台桌面全能助手，整合Claude Code、Codex、OpenCode等AI CLI工具，提供统一操作界面。
summary.en: cc-switch is a cross-platform desktop all-in-one assistant that unifies multiple AI CLI tools like Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, openclaw, and Gemini CLI into a single interface, simplifying workflow management and tool switching.

items.reason: Rust编写的编码代理工具，直接匹配LLM工具和Rust系统编程。

summary.zh: jcode是一个用Rust编写的编码代理框架，旨在简化和优化AI编码助手的工作流程，其突出的性能优势使其成为LangChain等技术栈的有力替代方案。
summary.en: jcode is a Rust-based coding agent harness designed to streamline and optimize AI coding assistant workflows, offering high performance as a notable alternative to frameworks like LangChain.

items.description: Code at the speed of thought – Zed is a high-performance, multiplayer code editor from the creators of Atom and Tree-sitter.
items.reason: 高性能Rust代码编辑器，精准匹配终端UI和开发者工具。

summary.zh: Zed 是由 Atom 和 Tree-sitter 创建者开发的 Rust 高性能多人代码编辑器，旨在替代传统编辑器。其突出特点是低延迟实时协作，支持多人同时编辑和共享光标。
summary.en: Zed is a high-performance multiplayer code editor from the creators of Atom and Tree-sitter, designed to replace traditional editors like VS Code. Its standout feature is low-latency real-time collaboration, allowing multiple developers to edit simultaneously with shared cursors and workspace.

profile.notes:
Prefers low-level, performance-sensitive, developer-focused projects.
Not interested in SaaS or marketing tooling.
